source: OCR-assisted analysis of tail rotor, tail drive line, tail gear box, hydraulic control, and engine fault-isolation manuals
note: This catalog records the recovered AMM families for the final user-supplied PDF batch analyzed on April 20, 2026. OCR was performed locally using the repo extractor with Windows OCR fallback for image-only PDFs.
